## Summary

-

## Scope

- [ ] Core shared types or utilities
- [ ] Vue components
- [ ] React components
- [ ] Tests
- [ ] Examples or documentation
- [ ] CLI or tooling
- [ ] Other

## Validation

- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] `pnpm build`
- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] `pnpm test:vue`
- [ ] `pnpm test:react`
- [ ] `pnpm test:validate`
- [ ] `pnpm size`
- [ ] `pnpm example:build`
- [ ] `npx playwright test`
- [ ] Not run; reason:

## Checklist

- [ ] I kept the change focused and avoided unrelated refactors.
- [ ] I updated shared core code when behavior is used by both frameworks.
- [ ] I updated Vue and React implementations when the public API changed.
- [ ] I added or updated tests for normal, accessibility, and edge cases.
- [ ] I updated examples, skills docs, or API docs when user-facing behavior changed.
- [ ] I considered SSR, keyboard navigation, i18n, and reduced-motion impact where relevant.
